data.title: Humanscale launches NexPoint™ kiosk POS system for retail, hospitality, and healthcare; features ergonomic design, improved comfort.
data.description: Humanscale, a top provider of ergonomic workplace solutions, unveiled the NexPoint™ kiosk in New York. This new POS system is designed to optimize comfort and customer experience in various industries, such as retail, hospitality, healthcare, and self-service environments. The NexPoint kiosk integrates Humanscale's acclaimed ergonomic approach to promote natural posture and reduce strain for employees. This initiative showcases Humanscale's commitment to enhancing workplace ergonomics and user satisfaction.

data.title: Bitcoin at $91,251.43, -0.09%; Ethereum at $3,099.73, -0.79%; XRP at $2.05, -0.60%; Dogecoin at $0.1367, -1.64%. Trading volume doubled to $38.78 billion for Bitcoin, $19.73 billion for Ethereum. Over $230 million liquidated in crypto market, >50% long liquidations. BTC expected to reclaim $100,000 if certain conditions met. For more details visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: Cryptocurrency market saw meandering prices on Monday with Bitcoin at $91,251.43, Ethereum at $3,099.73, XRP at $2.05, Solana at $139.04, and Dogecoin at $0.1367. Bitcoin started at $92,390 then dipped to $91,000; trading volume surged to $38.78 billion. Ethereum traded around $3,000 with volume at $19.73 billion. Related stocks like MSTR and BMNR closed up at 3.11% and 3.56%. Over $230 million was liquidated in 24 hours, mostly long positions. Bitcoin's open interest fell. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nift hires John McNerney as GM to lead APAC expansion, targeting Australia & Asia-Pacific region.
data.description: In a recent update, Nift has revealed the selection of John McNerney as the General Manager for the Asia-Pacific (APAC) region as the company moves forward with its expansion plans in Australia and the wider Asia-Pacific area.

data.title: Australian investors are optimistic about AI in 2026, expecting strong returns; starting year with high interest in technology.
data.description: Investors in Australia have kicked off the year with a keen interest in artificial intelligence, anticipating robust returns. The enthusiasm for AI technologies has surged, indicating a positive outlook on potential gains in this sector.

data.title: Ethereum must meet 'walkaway test' for 100-year survival: Buterin stresses need for quantum resistance, scalability, and decentralized block-building.
data.description: For Ethereum to remain viable in the long term, it must address challenges such as quantum resistance, scalability, and centralization resistance in its architecture. These improvements are crucial for Ethereum to withstand potential threats and ensure its longevity.

data.title: NEXCOM to showcase innovations at MWC Barcelona 2026 with expanded edge, security solutions. Leading supplier of network appliances.
data.description: NEXCOM, a prominent provider of network appliances, will be participating in MWC Barcelona 2026 to showcase an expanded range of products aimed at enhancing networks for telecom, enterprise, and industrial settings. This move underscores their dedication to supporting next-generation networks.
